name: Next.js app + layout + API client
description: Initialize a Next.js app in web/ with the app router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and a root layout. Create an API client module that points at the Go backend. Verify the dev server starts and renders a placeholder home page.
acceptance_criteria: web/ contains a Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS configured
web/src/app/layout.tsx defines a root layout with html/body structure
web/src/app/page.tsx renders a placeholder home page
web/src/lib/api.ts exports an API client with a configurable base URL
pnpm --dir web dev starts the dev server without errors
pnpm --dir web build produces a production build without errors
